summary: Full backend + frontend testing of SENTINEL OSINT military-grade intelligence dashboard. 25/25 backend API tests pass (100%). All 10 frontend pages load and function: Login with role presets, Dashboard (3D globe + situations + COA + Gantt), Tracking (Aircraft/Ships tabs), OSINT (people list + detail), Graph (force-directed), Analytics (KPIs + charts + AI insights), Mission, Search (FT + NL), Ingest (dropzone + upload), Audit (admin-only). Claude Sonnet 4.5 integrations (AI insights, NL query, file entity extraction) all working via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

integration_issues.issue: Aircraft tab count showed 0 at test time (OpenSky returned empty states for bounded region query). Not a code bug: fallback only triggers on exception, not on empty data. Consider triggering simulated fallback when real OpenSky returns 0 aircraft within bounding box.

action_items: (Optional enhancement) /api/aircraft/live: when OpenSky returns 0 aircraft in bounded region (not an exception), fall back to simulated so Tracking page is never empty. Currently acceptable per MVP spec.

(Optional) Add data-testid attributes on core interactive elements (login form inputs/submit, preset role buttons, logout button, tracking tab triggers, person card, ingest dropzone, search input/submit) to make Playwright testing more robust for future iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 817 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, events, osint, graph, missions, analytics, files, ai, audit) for maintainability.
Relationships collection unique index missing - duplicate links possible on repeated POST /api/graph/link with same source/target/relation.

Cookies set with SameSite=None; Secure are not accessible to cross-origin browsers due to Cloudflare ACAO rewrite (as noted). Bearer fallback covers this but cookie path is effectively dead weight for frontend flow.
ai_extract_entities returns summary prefixed with '(extraction error: ...)' on failure - exposes internal error details; consider opaque error message.
Event POST returns doc without stripping _id only after insert_one; existing code does doc.pop('_id', None) post-insert which is correct. Verified OK.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook mentions 5-attempt lockout) - not implemented. Not in scope of MVP features list but noted per playbook testing instructions.
test_credentials: admin@sentinel.mil/Sentinel2026! (admin), analyst@sentinel.mil/Analyst2026! (analyst), viewer@sentinel.mil/Viewer2026! (viewer) - all verified working
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed events/people/missions/links/files. Not cleaned up (MVP, low volume). Seeded admin/analyst/viewer + 12 events + 8 people + 8 ships + 6 orgs + 4 locations + 1 mission + relationships on startup - all verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Use: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. BASE URL read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Auth uses Bearer header (cookies are set but blocked cross-origin by Cloudflare ACAO rewrite). Frontend stores token in localStorage key 'sentinel_token'. When navigating pages with Playwright, use wait_until='domcontentloaded' NOT 'networkidle' because the app polls live data continuously. Dashboard logout button is an icon-only button (lucide LogOut) in top-right header without visible text - selector needs [aria-label] or icon-parent button targeting. AI features (insights, nl-query, file extraction) use Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations and respond in ~3-8 seconds.
rca of the issue: No blocker issues found. Minor observation on aircraft tracking: OpenSky bounded region query occasionally returns 0 results but fallback only activates on exception - behaviorally correct per code but UX could show simulated data on empty results.
